description: Composition Pink capris made of 100% sweat-absorbent pure cotton with stretchability, has an elasticated waistband and drawstring, flat seams to prevent irritation, reinforced tear points, embroidery on the left side below the waistband and cross-over hems with stitch detail Fit Regular Wash care Hand or machine wash cold with a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron These capris from urban yoga have a breathable fabric, and a soft waistband. Team them up with a cool T-shirt and a comfortable pair of shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
